description: Break-glass emergency access accounts. EXCLUDED from all Conditional Access policies to prevent tenant lockout.

group.description: Break-glass accounts excluded from CA policies. Membership is static and requires approval.

notes: CRITICAL: Members of this group bypass ALL Conditional Access. Membership must be audited monthly. Accounts must be cloud-only, use strong passwords (60+ char), and have their sign-in activity alerted on. Never add regular user accounts.
